tara.description: Mechanism-first Rosetta Stone. Same physical phenomenon, four stakeholder views. Security researchers see attack vectors. Clinicians see therapeutic modalities. Regulators see compliance requirements. Engineers see physical parameters.

dual_use_classifications.confirmed: Published therapeutic and security applications exist for this mechanism
dual_use_classifications.probable: Strong theoretical basis for dual-use; therapeutic research underway
dual_use_classifications.possible: Mechanism could have therapeutic applications but no published evidence
dual_use_classifications.silicon_only: Pure digital/firmware/infrastructure attack with no neural therapeutic analog

consent_tiers.standard: Standard informed consent (data collection, non-invasive monitoring)
consent_tiers.enhanced: BCI-specific consent (stimulation, neural recording, neural data processing)
consent_tiers.IRB: Institutional Review Board approval required (research, novel therapeutic applications)
consent_tiers.prohibited: Application prohibited outside controlled research (unacceptable risk)

fda_statuses.cleared: FDA 510(k) clearance for predicate device equivalence
fda_statuses.approved: FDA PMA (Premarket Approval) for Class III devices

data_classifications.sensitive_neural: Neural data with enhanced protections (proposed neurorights)
data_classifications.PII: Personally identifiable information (GDPR Art. 9 special category)

dsm5.name: DSM-5-TR Diagnostic Mapping via Neural Impact Chain
dsm5.description: Maps BCI techniques to psychiatric diagnoses through the hourglass band model. NISS metrics predict diagnostic clusters. First known formal BCI threat-to-psychiatric-diagnosis taxonomy.
dsm5.positioning: RDoC-aligned, BCI-specific, with quantitative bridge (NISS) to traditional nosology (DSM-5-TR)

CR.risk_domain: Cognitive read access (thought decoding, neural data inference)

CD.risk_domain: Cognitive write access (perception manipulation, identity modification)

timeline.title: TARA v1.0: Initial Atlas Published
timeline.description: First public release of the Therapeutic Applications & Risk Assessment atlas. 60 attack techniques. The starting point.

timeline.title: ONI Framework Repository Created
timeline.description: First commit of the original ONI (Open Neural Interface) framework. Predecessor to CPIF. 14-layer OSI model. Zero framework, zero scoring, just a question: what does security look like when the endpoint is a human brain?

timeline.title: ONI Demo Video v1.0 Complete
timeline.description: 3:56 animated explainer (Remotion + ElevenLabs). L1-L14 visualization, coherence gauge. First public-facing media.

timeline.title: Qinnovate Website Repository Created
timeline.description: First commit to the qinnovate.com website. Astro 5.x + React 19 + TailwindCSS 4. The public face of the project.

timeline.title: CPIF Born: 14-Layer Model Deprecated, Hourglass Adopted
timeline.description: Single session produced 13 derivation insights. CNF renamed to CPIF. 14-layer OSI model (v2.0) deprecated in favor of the 7-band symmetric (3-1-3) hourglass. CPIF-TRUTH.md created as canonical source of truth.

timeline.title: First Cross-AI Validation (Gemini 2.5)
timeline.description: Independent AI peer review by Gemini 2.5 of the hourglass model. Validation pipeline established.

timeline.title: Hamiltonian Root: QI Grounded in Physics Formalism
timeline.description: The QI equation grounded in Hamiltonian formalism. Not a heuristic score but a quantity derived from the system's energy landscape. The unifying mathematical root.

timeline.title: L=v/f Unification and 11-Band Model
timeline.description: Wavelength equation applied to neural security. Government-restricted spectrum attack mapping added. CPIF v4.0: 11 bands implemented (N7-N1, I0, S1-S3). Five coupling mechanisms identified.

timeline.title: NSP Formalized: 6-Layer Validation Stack
timeline.description: Neural Sensory Protocol designed as a 6-layer validation stack. Physics-based authentication using spectral invariants, microstate compliance, and challenge-response. Biological TLS.

timeline.title: NSP Goes Advanced
timeline.description: Neural data has a decades-long sensitivity window. Harvest-Now-Decrypt-Later threat model adopted. ML-KEM/ML-DSA integrated. 5 defense layers, Merkle-amortized SPHINCS+ signatures.

timeline.title: Black Hole Security Principle
timeline.description: Hawking/Susskind/Maldacena information principles applied to BCI security boundaries. Novel theoretical contribution.

timeline.title: Unified Neural Security Taxonomy
timeline.description: 60 attack techniques across 11 MITRE-compatible tactics spanning 7 domains. First structured BCI threat taxonomy.

timeline.title: NISS Created: BCI-Specific Severity Scoring
timeline.description: NISS (Neural Impact Scoring System) created because CVSS cannot account for biological reversibility, cognitive integrity impact, or neural tissue interaction. A severity metric built for brains, not servers.

timeline.title: First Multi-Model Validation Cycle
timeline.description: QwQ-32B, Grok-3, DeepSeek-R1, WhiteRabbitNeo, and Gemini independently reviewed CPIF framework. Consensus reached on hourglass model validity. 5 errors corrected.

timeline.title: Project Runemate Conceived
timeline.description: Runemate DSL conceived: a domain-specific language for neural rendering. 3-pass Gemini review. NSP unification confirmed.

timeline.title: NISS v1.0 Finalized
timeline.description: Spectral decomposition bridge connects raw neural signals to per-band QI scoring. Every technique scored for neural impact. Replaces CVSS for BCI context.

timeline.title: Dynamical Systems Security: 6 New Attack Classes
timeline.description: Bifurcation manipulation, basin erosion, strange attractor injection, Lyapunov destabilization, phase space compression, and resonance entrainment. Novel BCI attack vectors from dynamical systems theory.

timeline.title: TARA Reframe: Threat Catalog Becomes Therapeutic Atlas
timeline.description: Attack techniques reframed as dual-use: every neural attack has a therapeutic analog. 35-40 therapeutic counterparts, 10 ambiguous, 18 silicon-only. Registry transformed from threat catalog to risk-benefit atlas.

timeline.title: Framework Complete (v1): CPIF + NSP + NISS + TARA
timeline.description: First complete version of the full stack. 50 derivation log entries. 7 days of formal derivation. 4 framework versions. Ready for independent peer review.

timeline.title: TARA v1.3: S-Domain Consumer Sensor Expansion
timeline.description: Consumer device attack surface expanded. Synthetic band techniques for off-the-shelf sensors.

timeline.title: TARA v1.4: Consumer Side-Channel Techniques
timeline.description: 3 new techniques (T0100-T0102). Total: 102 techniques.

timeline.title: TARA-to-DSM-5-TR Diagnostic Mapping
timeline.description: Neural Impact Chain bridges attack techniques to DSM-5-TR diagnostic codes. 5 diagnostic clusters, 68 DSM codes mapped. Every TARA technique now maps to potential psychiatric outcomes.

timeline.title: Three Floors of Physics Integration
timeline.description: Landauer limit, Margolus-Levitin bound, and Heisenberg uncertainty integrated into CPIF constraint system. P=E/t computational scaling equation derived.

timeline.title: NSP Core Implementation: Rust ML-KEM + ML-DSA
timeline.description: Post-cyber-physical handshake implemented in Rust. ML-KEM-768 key exchange and ML-DSA-65 signatures working end-to-end. The cryptographic layer is real code, not just a spec.

timeline.title: Runemate Forge + NSP Integration Verified
timeline.description: End-to-end secure neural pipeline: HTML content compiled to Runemate Staves bytecode, encrypted via NSP advanced handshake, decrypted and rendered on target.

timeline.title: Zenodo Working Paper v1.0 Published
timeline.description: First public working paper: 28 pages, 6 figures, CC-BY-4.0. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18640106. 3 fabricated citations discovered and disclosed.

timeline.title: TARA v1.5: Neurorights Mapping
timeline.description: 4 neurorights (Mental Privacy, Cognitive Liberty, Mental Integrity, Psychological Continuity) mapped to all 102 techniques. Consent Complexity Index (CCI) introduced.

timeline.title: TARA v1.6: FDORA Regulatory Compliance
timeline.description: FDORA Section 3305 (Patch Act) coverage mapped to all techniques. Regulatory gap analysis complete.

timeline.title: BCI Hardware Inventory Published
timeline.description: 24 BCI devices catalogued from FDA filings, manufacturer datasheets, and peer-reviewed papers. Full specs with confidence levels.

timeline.title: Brain-BCI Atlas v1.2.0
timeline.description: 38 brain structures mapped to BCI devices, CPIF bands, neural latency metrics, and physics constraints.

timeline.title: BCI Limits Equation Synthesized
timeline.description: 13 physics constraints unified into a single system coupling thermodynamics, EM, Moore's Law, Shannon safety, Boltzmann detectability, and CPIF coherence. No published paper unifies all 13.

timeline.title: Physics Feasibility Tiering Complete
timeline.description: All 102 TARA techniques classified by physics feasibility tier. 61 feasible now, 11 near-term, 10 mid-term, 2 far-term, 18 no physics gate.

timeline.title: SSVEP Frequency Hijack (T0103)
timeline.description: Novel attack technique: hijacking steady-state visually evoked potentials via imperceptible screen flicker. Validated by Ming et al. (2023). 103rd technique added.

timeline.title: Zenodo Working Paper v1.4 Published
timeline.description: NISS score corrections (arithmetic mean), TMS citation fix, dual-use label fix, Sherman & Guillery citation added. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18677997

timeline.title: NSP Protocol Spec v0.5 Finalized
timeline.description: Protocol core and handshake complete. 5-layer neurosecurity stack, 3 device tiers, power budget modeled at 3.25% of 40 mW (hardware validation pending).

timeline.title: Neurowall v0.7: Signal Integrity Monitor
timeline.description: 3-layer coherence monitor built from v0.1 to v0.7 in a single day. Multi-band EEG, spectral peak detection, CUSUM change detection, ROC analysis. 7/9 attacks detected at 15s, 9/9 at 30s. 14 attack generators in neurosim toolkit.

timeline.title: BrainFlow Real Hardware Validation
timeline.description: First test of Neurowall on actual EEG hardware (OpenBCI Cyton via BrainFlow). 5/5 attacks detected, 0% false positive rate. Coherence monitor works on real signals, not just synthetic.

timeline.title: BCI Limits Equation Cross-Validated (Gemini 2.5 Pro)
timeline.description: 12/13 constraints verified correct. 2 corrections applied: mechanical mismatch ratio inverted, Johnson noise temperature corrected to 310K.

timeline.title: Validation Dashboard + TARA Badges
timeline.description: Living validation system tracking cross-AI validation sessions, citation checks, and fact verification. Status badges added to every TARA technique page.

timeline.title: Repository Consolidation: 17 Directories to 8
timeline.description: Major repo restructure. Autodidactive removed, governance merged, archives cleaned. 11 READMEs and tables of contents written. Neurorights map added to root README.

timeline.title: Unified CPIF API (/api/cpif.json)
timeline.description: Single endpoint serving all CPIF data: 103 threats, 24 devices, 38 brain regions, 13 physics constraints, scoring specs, timeline. CORS-enabled, open access. ~580 KB.

timeline.title: BCI Research Hub Launched
timeline.description: Dedicated /research/ section consolidating hardware explorer, limits equation, security guardrails, and API documentation under one roof.

timeline.title: Automation Registry + Timeline Tracking
timeline.description: 30 automations catalogued (10 active workflows, 8 disabled, 6 scripts, 4 planned). Timeline staleness detection automated. Self-updating registry via daily GitHub Action.

timeline.title: TARA v1.7: Origin Classification + 6 New Techniques
timeline.description: All 109 techniques tagged with origin provenance (literature, cpif_recontextualized, cpif_chain_synthesis, cpif_theoretical, neuroethics_formalized). Original authors credited. 6 new techniques added (T0104-T0109): 4 from Murcia/Lopez Bernal taxonomy gap, 1 neuromorphic mimicry, 1 data alignment exploitation. 24 new research sources added (165 to 193).

timeline.title: Neurowall v0.8: RunematePolicy Engine
timeline.description: L3 policy agent replaced 14-line if/else stub with a full rule-stack engine. 5 prioritized rules (critical_niss, high_niss, sustained_anomaly, growth_detected, spectral_peak) with cooldown, sustained window tracking, stimulation suppression, and configurable policy stacks. Gemini-validated (Phase 11).

timeline.title: CVE Disclosure Response Received
timeline.description: Coordinated vulnerability disclosure for BCI-adjacent streaming library received initial response. Public references genericized to protect disclosure timeline.

timeline.title: NISS v1.1: Cognitive Read/Write Split
timeline.description: Single Cognitive Integrity (CG) metric split into Cognitive Reconnaissance (CR, read-side) and Cognitive Disruption (CD, write-side). Weights normalized: CR=0.5, CD=0.5 preserving 20% cognitive share. Cross-AI validated (Gemini 2.5 Pro, Phase 16). 109 techniques rescored.

timeline.title: Zenodo Working Paper v1.5 Published
timeline.description: NISS v1.1 CR/CD split, weight normalization, 6 metrics. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18784513. All site documentation synced to v1.1.

timeline.title: FIRST.org CVSS SIG: NISS Accepted for Resources Repo
timeline.description: CVSS SIG Co-Chair Nick Leali confirmed NISS extension discussed by the SIG and offered inclusion in the official CVSS Resources repository (github.com/FIRSTdotorg/cvss-resources). First external standards body recognition of the framework.

timeline.title: Joined FIRST.org CVSS Special Interest Group
timeline.description: Registered as CVSS SIG member via FIRST portal. Contributing domain expertise on neural interface security scoring. The SIG noted no existing domain experts in BCI security among current members.

timeline.title: BCI Security Plugin v1.0: Claude Code Marketplace
timeline.description: Published the first neurotechnology security plugin for any AI coding platform. 6 skills (TARA lookup, NISS scoring, neuromodesty check, threat modeling, code scanning, interactive learning), 2 slash commands (/bci, /bci-scan), 1 threat modeling agent, 1 neural data detection hook. Zero dependencies. Designed by 8-agent Quorum swarm, validated by 4-agent review swarm. Dual-licensed: Apache 2.0 (code), CC BY-SA 4.0 (data). github.com/qinnovates/bci-security

timeline.title: TARA v1.7: 135 Techniques with Full Evidence Tiers
timeline.description: Expanded from 109 to 135 techniques across 11 biological domains. Added 26 new techniques (CPIF-T0110-T0135) covering neuroendocrine, glial, neurovascular, and receptor domains. 6 evidence tiers (CONFIRMED/EMERGING/DEMONSTRATED/THEORETICAL/PLAUSIBLE/SPECULATIVE). Full FDORA Section 524B regulatory mapping. 21-agent validation swarm with zero fabricated techniques.

timeline.title: TARA v1.8: ICD-10 Field Split + NISS Re-scoring
timeline.description: Separated ICD-10 codes (G/H/R) from DSM-5-TR codes (F) across 38 techniques — 64 codes moved to new icd10 field. Re-scored all 26 new techniques (T0110-T0135) from placeholder vectors to individually assessed NISS vectors. Quorum-validated. 6 PINS flags added. Components block deprecated. Severity distribution: 20 high, 59 medium, 55 low, 1 none.

timeline.title: Phase 14: Three-Model Tier 3 Validation
timeline.description: 17 Tier 3 claims (math, physics, engineering, clinical) validated by Claude Quorum (8 agents), Codex GPT-5.2, and Gemini CLI. 1 claim removed (motor cortex structural override — neuromodesty violation). 1 citation corrected (Shannon 1992 — electrical, not thermal). 8 claims qualified with evidence-based caveats. All 3 models agreed on removal.

timeline.title: Whitepaper v8.0: 8 New Sections Rendered
timeline.description: Sections 12-19 rendered from draft to site: Neural Terminal, Patient Self-Sovereignty, Autonomy Guardrails, Passwordless Security, Neural OS Architecture, Vision Restoration Pipeline, Governance Extended, Research Validation. Plus NISS 5.8-5.9 (sensory weighting, neuroplasticity metric). Derivation log count corrected to 106.

timeline.title: BCI Directory: HuggingFace-Style Device Explorer
timeline.description: New page at /bci/directory/ — 57 companies, 68 devices in filterable card grid. 4-mode lens toggle (Security/Clinical/Market/Research), entity toggle (Company/Device), filter chips, KQL-powered search, dynamic aggregate counters, inline detail expansion.

timeline.title: CPIF-TRUTH v4.3: Full NISS/TARA Current State
timeline.description: Source of truth updated with computed numbers: 135 techniques, 12 domains, 3 modes, severity 20/59/55/1, neurorights distribution, ICD-10 split documentation, version history table. All numbers from registrar, not estimated.
